CsvFormatNotes: Choose 'CSV' as the format. Avoid PDF or MT940.
Steps: Go to internetbankieren.abnamro.nl and log in.
The file is saved in your Downloads folder.
Go to mijn.ing.nl and log in.
The file is saved in your Downloads folder.
Open the Rabobank app or go to bankieren.rabobank.nl.
If on your phone, choose 'Save to Files' so you can find it later.

CsvFormatNotes: Triodos Bank Internet Bankieren — CSV exporteren
Steps: Log in op Internet Bankieren van Triodos.
Klik in het menu op Zelf regelen.
Selecteer de rekening waarvan je transacties wilt downloaden.
De download verschijnt onder: 'Overzicht van aangevraagde downloads'.
Klik op Download om het .csv-bestand op te slaan.
Log in op ASN Online Bankieren.
Klik op Bij- en afschrijvingen downloaden.
Klik op Downloaden om het .csv-bestand op te slaan.

CsvFormatNotes: SNS uses the same platform as ASN Bank. Choose CSV format.
Steps: Go to mijn.snsbank.nl and log in.
The file is saved in your Downloads folder.

CsvFormatNotes: bunq exports via the app. Choose CSV format.
Steps: Choose 'Save to Files' so you can find the file in PoenPlanner.

CsvFormatNotes: Choose 'CSV' when downloading your statement. Excel format also works.
Steps: Go to americanexpress.com/nl and log in.
Select the statement period you want.
The file is saved in your Downloads folder.
If on your phone, choose 'Save to Files' so you can find it later.

CsvFormatNotes: ICS is the main credit card provider in the Netherlands for Visa and Mastercard.
Steps: Go to mijn.icscards.nl and log in.
Select the period you want to export.
The file is saved in your Downloads folder.
If on your phone, choose 'Save to Files' so you can find it later.

CsvFormatNotes: N26 exports CSV from the app or web interface.
Steps: Open the N26 app or go to app.n26.com.
Tap the download or export icon.
Choose 'Save to Files' so you can find it later.

CsvFormatNotes: Revolut exports CSV from the app. Choose 'Excel' or 'CSV' format.
Steps: Tap on your account or the transaction list.
Tap the '...' menu or the statement/export icon.
Choose 'Save to Files' so you can find it later.

CsvFormatNotes: Wise exports CSV from both the app and website.
Steps: Open the Wise app or go to wise.com and log in.
If on your phone, choose 'Save to Files' so you can find it later.
